name: paywhere-smb
description: Pre-built small business finance workflows (cash-flow forecasting, month-end close, payroll planning, AP batch bill-pay, hours billing + contractor payouts, invoice chasing, commission payouts across ACH/Wire/Stablecoin) using your Paywhere account, QuickBooks, Gmail, and Google Drive — plus a single repeatable /demo-setup command for the hosted sandbox. You approve every step that touches money.
